prompt:
Ultra-realistic 4K candid photograph of a young East Asian woman standing beside a softly humming vending machine in a dark hallway at night. Pale skin reflecting direct camera flash with faint neon light spill from the vending machine. Loose black hair, naturally messy and slightly tousled. She wears a muted coral baby tee and relaxed pale blue cargo pants.
Beige hallway walls with visible scuff marks, peeling paint, and torn paper notices. Flash-lit foreground with strong shadows,
